title: Missing canonical vector files: senml, SCHC fragmentation, signed-frame composition, SLIP golden, SRH
description: Formats with cross-impl divergence risk and NO oracle file: (1) senml.json - the format family with the worst divergence (mmgu.14/.15) has no arbiter; (2) schc_fragment.json - three incompatible C/Python/Rust fragment formats (mmgu.5); (3) signed-frame composition vector - all three sign epoch||seqnum(BE)||dst_addr||inner_payload (Python link_layer.py:174-206, Rust schnorr.rs:186-194, C schnorr48.c:290-297), agreeing today but nothing in CI would catch drift, and the draft says the signed data should include LENGTH||LLSec (spec-reconciliation child); (4) SLIP golden vectors - three SLIP implementations, no shared encode/decode vectors; (5) SRH (source routing header) insert/advance vectors - Python-only implementation with an ordering convention that must be pinned before Rust/C add theirs. Generate from the Python oracle after the relevant semantics beads are decided.
